title: stelis luteria
intro: Stelis luteria, also known as the "Ant Orchid," is a species of epiphytic orchid native to tropical America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The roots of the Stelis luteria plant are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Stelis luteria can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and has been traditionally used to promote digestion, alleviate pain, and support immune function.
